title: WpfHexEditor Debug Launch Configuration
description: Schema for .whdbg debug launch configuration files used by WpfHexEditor IDE.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the debug session selector.

program.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the program to debug.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the program.

cwd.description: Working directory for the debug session. Defaults to the program directory.

env.description: Additional environment variables injected into the debuggee.

stopAtEntry.description: Halt at the program entry point before executing any user code.

processId.description: Process ID to attach to (only used when request is 'attach').

projectPath.description: Path to the .csproj or .vbproj file (used by the C# adapter to load build output).

justMyCode.description: When true, the debugger skips non-user code (framework internals).

console.description: Where the debuggee's stdout/stderr are shown.
